description: Manifest for the memory bench corpus. The toy fixture is always vendored; LongMemEval + LoCoMo are fetched into the gitignored 'cache/' directory by 'pnpm --filter aura-api bench:fetch-corpus' before the first run.

toy.notes: Hand-written smoke-test fixture. Always vendored — safe to run anywhere, no network calls.

longmemeval.notes: Oracle variant (evidence sessions only, cheapest to replay). Cleaned release. Fetched on demand into cache/.

locomo.notes: 10 conversations × ~300 turns × up to 35 sessions. Fetched on demand into cache/.
